bulletins.title: Lewotolok (Indonesia) - Report for 26 February-4 March 2026 - Continuing Eruptive Activity
bulletins.summary: The Pusat Vulkanologi dan Mitigasi Bencana Geologi (PVMBG) reported ongoing eruptive activity at Lewotolok during 26 February-4 March. White plumes rose as high as 50 m above the summit and drifted E on 26 February; plumes were not observed on the other days.
